landing.title: Wedingo — Izimemo zomshado
landing.subtitle: Dala futhi wabelane ngesimemo sakho somshado esiqondene nawe.
landing.description: Phatha idatha yesimemo sakho, yabelana ngesixhumanisi esiyingqayizivele nezivakashi zakho futhi uthole iziqinisekiso zokuba khona kwazo.
landing.errorEmpty: Faka igama lakho lomsebenzisi nekhodi yokungena.
landing.sessionExists: Kuneseshini esebenzayo yalesi simemo. Ingabe ufuna ukungena noma kunjalo? Iseshini yangaphambili izovala.

details.welcomeWithTime: Sikulindele ukwabelana nathi ngesikhathi esikhethekile. Siqala ngo-{{time}}. Ngezansi uzothola ibalazwe lendawo.
details.welcomeWithoutTime: Sikulindele ukwabelana nathi ngesikhathi esikhethekile. Ngezansi uzothola ibalazwe lendawo.

info.schedulePending: Uhlelo olunemininingwane luzokwabelwa zonke izivakashi maduze.

gifts.title: Ukuba khona kwakho yisipho esikhulu kunazo zonke

rsvp.title: Qinisekisa ukuba khona kwakho
rsvp.description: Impendulo yakho isisiza ukuhlela yonke imininingwane yomgubho.
rsvp.allergiesHint: Khombisa kuphela ukungezwani nokudla nokungabekezeleli. Ungafaki ulwazi lwezokwelapha olungaceliwe.
rsvp.healthConsent: Ngiyavuma ukucutshungulwa kwedatha yami yezempilo (ukungezwani nokungabekezeleli) ukuze kuhambisane nemenyu yomgubho
rsvp.ageConsent: Ngiyamemezela ukuthi ngineminyaka engaphezu kwe-14 noma, uma ngingaphansi, nginemvume yabazali bami noma yabanakekeli bami
rsvp.withdrawConfirm: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuhoxisa isiqinisekiso sakho?
rsvp.ageUnder14Warning: Uneminyaka engaphansi kwe-14. Udinga imvume yabazali bakho noma yabanakekeli bakho.
rsvp.parentalConsent: Abazali bami noma abanakekeli bami bayavuma ukubamba kwami iqhaza

public.notFoundText: Asisitholanga isimemo ngalesi sixhumanisi. Uma ucabanga ukuthi kuyiphutha, thintana nababungazi.
public.emptyText: Dala futhi wabelane ngesimemo sakho somshado esiqondene nawe.
public.emptyDescription: Phatha idatha yesimemo sakho, yabelana ngesixhumanisi esiyingqayizivele nezivakashi zakho futhi uthole iziqinisekiso zokuba khona kwazo.

setup.usernameHint: Sebenzisa izinhlamvu nezinombolo. Uzolidinga ukungena kuphaneli lapho iseshini yakho iphela.
setup.godparentsHint: Uma ubhala igama elilodwa, elinye liyisibopho futhi.
setup.backgroundText: Layisha isithombe noma khetha ingemuva lekhava.
setup.musicHint: Isixhumanisi sefayela lomsindo le-MP3 elizodlala kukhava.
setup.placeHint: Bhala indawo bese ukhetha okukodwa emiphumeleni.
setup.schedulePlaceholder:
Isibonelo: 18:00 Ukwamukela izivakashi
18:30 Umcimbi
19:30 I-cocktail
21:00 Idili
23:00 Umdanso
setup.scheduleHint: Bhala uhlelo, umugqa owodwa ngomcimbi ngamunye.
setup.transportPlaceholder: Isibonelo: Ibhasi lisuka eSigcawini Esikhulu ngo-17:00. Indawo yokupaka yamahhala endaweni.
setup.transportHint: Izinketho zokuthutha, izikhathi zamabhasi, indawo yokupaka, njll.
setup.menuHint: Chaza imenyu ngayinye. Uma inganikezwa, yishiye ingenalutho.
setup.menuRequiredText: Kuyisibopho: i-desert kanye nemenyu eyodwa enkulu okungenani.
setup.menuTextoPlaceholder: Chaza imenyu: isidlwana sokuqala, isidlo esikhulu, i-desert...
setup.menuTextoHint: Chaza imenyu oyilungiselele. Izivakashi zizoyibona lapho ziqinisekisa.
setup.giftsInfoHint: Khombisa uma nithanda imali, inombolo ye-akhawunti, njll.
setup.bankInfoHint: Inombolo ye-akhawunti yokudlulisa imali, uma kudingeka.
setup.errorFileFormat: Ifomethi engavumelekile. Sebenzisa i-JPG noma i-PNG.
setup.noValidFiles: Ayikho ifayela elifanele. Okuningi 20 MB, JPG/PNG.

attendance.statsLine: {{yes}} bayaqinisekisa · {{no}} bayenqaba · {{companions}} abahambisana nabo · {{diet}} ngokudla okukhethekile

access.description: Sebenzisa lesi sigaba ukukhiqiza ikhodi entsha. Ikhodi yangaphambili ngeke isasebenza.
access.currentTokenDescription: Ukukhiqiza ikhodi entsha, bhala ikhodi yokungena yamanje.
access.deleteDataDescription: Uma ufisa ukusebenzisa amalungelo akho e-ARSO, ungasusa yonke idatha yakho.
access.deleteInvitation: Susa isimemo sami nayo yonke idatha yami

support.title: Ukusekelwa
support.description: Uma unanoma iyiphi inkinga noma umbuzo ngesimemo, ungathinta umthuthukisi:
support.rightsDescription: Ungacela ukususwa noma ukukhishwa kwedatha yakho yomuntu siqu nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuvumelana negunya lakho (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA noma POPIA).
support.rightsHint: Iklayenti lakho le-imeyili lizovulwa ngesifanekiso esichazwe kusengaphambili. Ungaphinde ubhalele ku-adriancl2001@gmail.com.
support.ccpaText: I-Wedingo ayithengisi idatha yomuntu siqu. Idatha eqoqiwe isetshenziselwa ukuphathwa kwesimemo kuphela. Uma uyisakhamuzi sase-California, unelungelo lokucela ukususwa kwedatha yakho nokungabandlululwa ngokusebenzisa amalungelo akho.
support.appDescription: Uhlelo lokusebenza lewebhu lokuphathwa kwezimemo zomshado.
support.copyright: © {{year}} Adrián Carrasco López. Wonke amalungelo agciniwe.
support.deleteEmailBody:
Sawubona,

Ngicela ukususwa kwedatha yami yomuntu siqu ehlotshaniswa nalesi simemo:

Igama lesivakashi:
Ithokheni yesimemo (uma uyazi):

Ukusetshenziswa kwelungelo lokucishwa (GDPR Isigaba 17 / CCPA / LGPD / POPIA).

Ngiyabonga.
support.exportEmailBody:
Sawubona,

Ngicela ukukhishwa kwedatha yami yomuntu siqu ehlotshaniswa nalesi simemo:

Ngiyabonga.

cookie.title: Imvume yamakhukhi
cookie.text: I-Wedingo isebenzisa isitoreji sendawo esidingekayo ukuze isimemo sisebenze (ukugcina iseshini yakho nokuncamelayo). Asisebenzisi amakhukhi ezinhlangano zesithathu noma izilandeleli.

legal.privacyPolicy:
Obhekele ukucutshungulwa kwedatha: Adrián Carrasco López. Oxhumana naye: adriancl2001@gmail.com. Injongo: ukuphathwa kwezimemo zomshado, ukuqinisekiswa kokuba khona kanye nokuxhumana komcimbi.

Isisekelo sezomthetho: imvume yomuntu othintekayo (Isigaba 6.1.a GDPR). Idatha yezempilo (ukungezwani nokudla nokungabekezeleli) icutshungulwa ngemvume ecacile (Isigaba 9.2.a GDPR) ukuze kuhambisane nemenyu yomgubho.

Idatha eqoqiwe: igama, okuthandwayo ekudleni (ukungezwani nokungabekezeleli), izithombe ezilayishwe ngokuzithandela, imininingwane yasebhange uma inikezwe ngokuzithandela.

Abemukeli: i-Google LLC (Firebase, Google Cloud Platform) ezinze e-US. I-Google ibhalisele Izinhlinzeko Zezivumelwano Ezejwayelekile (SCC) ezigunyazwe Ikhomishini YaseYurophu (Isinqumo Sokuqalisa 2021/914) futhi inesivumelwano Sokucutshungulwa Kwedatha (DPA) ngokuhambisana ne-Isigaba 28 GDPR. Ngaphezu kwalokho, i-Google ihambisana Nohlaka Lwobumfihlo Bedatha (DPF) lwe-EU-US, UK-US kanye ne-Switzerland-US.

Ukudluliselwa kwamazwe ngamazwe: idatha igcinwa kumaseva e-Google Cloud esifundeni se-eur3 (IYurophu, i-Frankfurt). Lapho kudingeka ukudlulisela idatha e-US, ukudluliselwa kuvikelwa yi-SCC kanye nesitifiketi se-DPF sika-Google.

Isikhathi sokugcina: idatha yezivakashi igcinwa kuze kube yizinyanga eziyi-12 ngemuva kosuku lomcimbi. Ngemuva kwaleso sikhathi, izosuswa ngokuzenzakalela. Idatha yokumisa yomdali igcinwa inqobo nje uma i-akhawunti isebenza.

Amalungelo: ungasebenzisa amalungelo akho okufinyelela, ukulungisa, ukususwa, ukuvinjelwa, ukuphatheka nokuphikisa ngokubhalela ku-adriancl2001@gmail.com. Izivakashi zingacela ukususwa kwedatha yazo ngokukhomba igama lazo nesimemo. Sizophendula isicelo sakho kungakapheli izinsuku ezingama-30.

Ilungelo lokuhoxisa imvume: ungahoxisa imvume yakho nganoma yisiphi isikhathi, ngomthelela wesikhathi esizayo, ngezindlela ezikhonjisiwe ngenhla. Ukuhoxisa akuthinti ukuba semthethweni kokucutshungulwa kwangaphambilini.

Ilungelo lokufaka isikhalazo esiphathimandleni esiqaphayo: ngaphansi kwe-GDPR, unelungelo lokufaka isikhalazo esiphathimandleni esivikela idatha endaweni yakho. E-Spain: AEPD (www.aepd.es).
legal.termsText:
Ukusebenzisa i-Wedingo kusho ukwamukela le migomo. I-Wedingo iyinkundla yokudala nokuphatha izimemo zomshado.

Umsebenzisi uyavuma ukuthi ngeke asebenzise inkundla ngezinjongo ezingekho emthethweni noma ukuthumela okuqukethwe okuhlaselayo.

I-Wedingo ayinasibopho ngokuqukethwe okukhiqizwe abasebenzisi noma ukusetshenziswa kwezivakashi kwedatha yazo yomuntu siqu.

Sinelungelo lokushintsha le migomo. Izinguquko zizokwaziswa ngenkundla.

Kuzakhamuzi zase-California: uma kuba nokungqubuzana phakathi kwale migomo kanye ne-CCPA, amalungelo anikezwe i-CCPA azonqoba.
legal.legalText:
Ngokuhambisana neSahluko 10 soMthetho 34/2002, wangomhla ziyi-11 kuJulayi, wezinkonzo Zomphakathi Wemininingwane kanye Nezohwebo Lwe-elektroniki (LSSI-CE), kuyaziswa ukuthi:

Obhekele: Adrián Carrasco López
I-imeyili: adriancl2001@gmail.com
Inhloso yewebhusayithi: inkundla yezimemo zomshado eziqondene nawe.

Le webhusayithi isebenzisa i-Firebase (Google LLC) njengengqalasizinda yokubamba nokugcina, ngamaseva ase-European Union.

errors.fileFormat: Ifomethi engavumelekile. Sebenzisa i-JPG noma i-PNG.
errors.fileSize: Isithombe sidlula ku-20 MB. Sebenzisa isithombe esilula.
errors.acceptPrivacyPolicy: Kufanele wamukele Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ukuze udale isimemo.
errors.usernameRequired: Khombisa igama lomsebenzisi ukuze ukwazi ukungena kamuva.
errors.usernameInvalid: Igama lomsebenzisi lingaqukatha izinhlamvu nezinombolo kuphela.
errors.usernameTooLong: Igama lomsebenzisi alikwazi ukudlula izinhlamvu ezingama-50.
errors.dayInvalid: Usuku kufanele lube phakathi kuka-1 no-31.
errors.hourInvalid: Ihora kufanele libe phakathi kuka-0 no-23.
errors.minuteInvalid: Imizuzu kufanele ibe phakathi kuka-00 no-59.
errors.dateNotValid: Usuku olufakiwe aluvumelekile (isibonelo u-30 February akekho).
errors.dateBeforeToday: Usuku lomshado alukwazi ukuba ngaphambi kwanamuhla.
errors.godparentsRequired: Uma ubhala umkhaphi oyedwa, amagama womabili ayisibopho.
errors.menuRequired: Chaza okungenani imenyu eyodwa enkulu (inyama, inhlanzi noma i-vegan).
errors.musicUrlInvalid: Isixhumanisi somculo kufanele sibe yi-URL evumelekile (https://...).
errors.sectionOrderMismatch: Uhlelo lwezigaba lunezinto ezingu-{{actual}}, bekulindelwe ezingu-{{expected}}.
errors.messageTooLong: Umyalezo wesimemo awukwazi ukudlula izinhlamvu ezingama-500.
errors.giftsTooLong: Ulwazi lwezipho alukwazi ukudlula izinhlamvu ezingama-2000.
errors.transportTooLong: Ulwazi lwezokuthutha alukwazi ukudlula izinhlamvu ezingama-2000.
errors.configSaveFailed: Ukugcina ukumiswa akuphumelelanga. Uma kungokokuqala, zama ukungena ngokusuka kuphaneli yangasese.
errors.deleteConfirm: Susa sonke isimemo sakho? Yonke idatha, izithombe nezimpendulo zizosuswa. Akunakuhlehliswa.
errors.configLoadFailed: Ukulayisha ukumiswa akuphumelelanga. Hlola uxhumo bese uzama futhi.

superadmin.expiredInvitations: {{count}} isimemo/izimemo ezinaphezu kwezinyanga eziyi-12 kusukela umshado
superadmin.expiredText: Ngokwenqubomgomo yobumfihlo, le datha bekufanele isuswe ngokuzenzakalela.
superadmin.cleanConfirm: Susa izimemo eziphelelwe isikhathi ezingu-{{count}}? Idatha yezivakashi ehlobene izosuswa futhi.
superadmin.firebaseAccount: Ukuphatha i-akhawunti yakho yomphathi omkhulu, sebenzisa ikhonsoli ye-Firebase:

data.noInvitations: No hay invitaciones en el sistema.
data.deletedOne: Invitación {{token}} eliminada con todos sus datos.
data.partialDelete: Solo se eliminaron {{deleted}} de {{total}}. Revisa los permisos.
data.deleteFailed: Error al eliminar. Verifica la consola.
data.deleteAllConfirm: ¿Estás SEGURO? Esto eliminará TODAS las invitaciones, RSVPs, galería y tokens del sistema. Esta acción NO se puede deshacer.

compliance.title: Irejista yemisebenzi yokucubungula (Isigaba 30 GDPR)
compliance.updated: Kubuyekeziwe: Julayi 2026. Le rejista ibhala imisebenzi yokucubungula idatha yomuntu siqu ku-Wedingo.
compliance.row1Data: Amagama abashadayo, usuku, indawo, indikimba, izithombe, umculo, imenyu, izigaba
compliance.row1Purpose: Ukudala nokwenza ngendlela oyifisayo isimemo somshado
compliance.row2Data: Igama lesivakashi, ukuba khona (yebo/cha), ukukhetha imenyu, ukungezwani, idatha yezempilo
compliance.row5Data: Izenzo zomphathi omkhulu, amathokheni asetshenzisiwe, izimemo ezisusiwe
compliance.internationalText: Idatha igcinwa kumaseva e-Google Cloud esifundeni se-eur3 (e-Frankfurt, e-Jalimani). I-Google LLC (US) isebenza njengomcubunguli wedatha ngaphansi kwe-DPA ngokuhambisana ne-Isigaba 28 GDPR. Ukudluliselwa e-US kuvikelwa:
compliance.dpf: Uhlaka Lobumfihlo Bedatha (DPF) EU-US, UK-US kanye ne-Switzerland-US
compliance.measureEncryption: Ukubhalwa ngekhodi kwe-AES-256-GCM kwezithombe nedatha ebucayi (PBKDF2)
compliance.measureFirestore: Imithetho yokuphepha ye-Firestore (ukulawulwa kokufinyelela okusekelwe ezikhathini zokusebenza)
compliance.measureStorage: Isitoreji sendawo esincane futhi ngemvume kuphela
compliance.measureRetention: Inqubomgomo yokugcina: izinyanga eziyi-12 ngemuva komcimbi ngedatha yezivakashi
compliance.measureSuperadmin: Umphathi omkhulu uvikwe yi-Firebase Authentication + umzila ofihliwe
